deck.author: OpenAI Codex
deck.subject: Demonstration presentation
deck.title: Aalto demo
deck.outline:
1. Welcome to Aalto University - Aalto University combines six schools to foster interdisciplinary research and education.
2. Research Highlights and Facilities - Aalto excels in fields like quantum computing, sustainability, and photonics through dedicated units.
3. Engage with Aalto's Ecosystem - Aalto offers open courses, founder programs, and events accessible to all.

slide-01.intent: Introduce Aalto University as a hub for innovation, design, and technology.
slide-01.layoutHint: Use a clear visual treatment that reinforces Aalto University combines six schools to foster interdisciplinary research and education. without reducing readability.
slide-01.mustInclude: Aalto University combines six schools to foster interdisciplinary research and education.
slide-01.notes: Use general knowledge about Aalto University's structure from retrieved snippets [1], [2].
slide-01.title: Welcome to Aalto University
slide-01.value: Aalto University combines six schools to foster interdisciplinary research and education.

slide-02.intent: Highlight specific research strengths and facilities across the six schools.
slide-02.layoutHint: Use a clear visual treatment that reinforces Aalto excels in fields like quantum computing, sustainability, and photonics through dedicated units. without reducing readability.
slide-02.mustInclude: Aalto excels in fields like quantum computing, sustainability, and photonics through dedicated units.
slide-02.notes: Focus on the three key research areas mentioned in the approved outline.
slide-02.title: Research Highlights and Facilities
slide-02.value: Audience recognizes Aalto's cutting-edge capabilities in science and engineering.

slide-03.intent: Summarize opportunities for learning, entrepreneurship, and community engagement.
slide-03.layoutHint: Use a clear visual treatment that reinforces Aalto offers open courses, founder programs, and events accessible to all. without reducing readability.
slide-03.mustInclude: Aalto offers open courses, founder programs, and events accessible to all.
slide-03.notes: Reference snippets [3], [5] regarding Lifewide Learning, Open University, Founder Sprint, and events.
slide-03.title: Engage with Aalto's Ecosystem
slide-03.value: Aalto offers open courses, founder programs, and events accessible to all.
